title: Distributing the Project Initiation Document and Securing Client Sign‑off
summary: Guidelines for sharing the PID with the project team and client, obtaining formal sign‑off, and storing the document in a version‑controlled repository.
content: After completion, circulate the PID to the entire project team, new members, and the client. Obtain client sign‑off to formalize assumptions and the RACI. Store the document in a version‑controlled repository for future reference during check‑ins and stakeholder changes.
can_answer: How should I share the PID with stakeholders?
Do I need formal client sign‑off on the PID?
examples: Upload the PID to the project’s SharePoint folder and send a notification email to all stakeholders.
warnings: Not obtaining sign‑off can make assumptions ambiguous later.
